source.title: Sexually Transmitted Infections Treatment Guidelines, 2021 — Genital Ulcers, Anogenital Warts, and Human Papillomavirus Infections
source.jurisdiction: United States federal public-health guidance requiring UAE epidemiology, laboratory, medicine and reporting adaptation
source.population: Sexually active adolescents and adults with genital, anal or perianal ulcers, anogenital warts, HPV infection or related counselling needs, with pregnancy, immune-status, anatomy and exposure qualifiers.
source.setting: Clinical STI evaluation, diagnosis discussion, counselling and clinician-selected management.
source.exclusions: Exact for recording lesion history and examination, differential context, clinician-selected testing, entered wart or HPV findings, partner or STI context and counselling. It does not diagnose an STI, infer sexual exposure, choose treatment or define UAE reporting pathways.

source.title: WHO guideline for screening and treatment of cervical pre-cancer lesions for cervical cancer prevention, second edition
source.jurisdiction: International WHO guidance requiring national programme adaptation
source.population: General population of women and women living with HIV within programme-defined cervical screening ages and pathways.
source.setting: Organised cervical screening, triage, treatment and follow-up programmes.
source.exclusions: Exact for documenting an identified screening test, result, programme population, triage or follow-up already selected by a clinician or programme. It does not infer a result, diagnosis, treatment or UAE interval.
source.evidence_paraphrase: Defines programme population, HPV-based screening, triage and screen-triage-treat pathways with different considerations for women living with HIV.

items.final_wording: Supports documenting an entered HPV or triage result and clinician-selected next pathway while preserving age, HIV, test and programme qualifiers.

added_items.final_wording: Defines programme population, HPV-based screening, triage and screen-triage-treat pathways with different considerations for women living with HIV.

source.title: WHO guideline for screening and treatment of cervical pre-cancer lesions for cervical cancer prevention, second edition
source.jurisdiction: International WHO guidance requiring national programme adaptation
source.population: General population of women and women living with HIV within programme-defined cervical screening ages and pathways.
source.setting: Organised cervical screening, triage, treatment and follow-up programmes.
source.exclusions: Exact for documenting an identified screening test, result, programme population, triage or follow-up already selected by a clinician or programme. It does not infer a result, diagnosis, treatment or UAE interval.
source.evidence_paraphrase: Defines programme population, HPV-based screening, triage and screen-triage-treat pathways with different considerations for women living with HIV.

added_items.final_wording: Supports documenting an entered HPV or triage result and clinician-selected next pathway while preserving age, HIV, test and programme qualifiers.

source.title: WHO guideline for screening and treatment of cervical pre-cancer lesions for cervical cancer prevention, second edition
source.jurisdiction: International WHO guidance requiring national programme adaptation
source.population: General population of women and women living with HIV within programme-defined cervical screening ages and pathways.
source.setting: Organised cervical screening, triage, treatment and follow-up programmes.
source.exclusions: Exact for documenting an identified screening test, result, programme population, triage or follow-up already selected by a clinician or programme. It does not infer a result, diagnosis, treatment or UAE interval.

exact_location.heading: Recommendations for HPV-positive triage and treatment eligibility

source.evidence_paraphrase: Supports documenting an entered HPV or triage result and clinician-selected next pathway while preserving age, HIV, test and programme qualifiers.

added_items.rationale: Supports an entered result and clinician-selected pathway.

added_items.final_wording: Supports documenting an entered HPV result, the limitations of source attribution and timing, partner discussion and screening-programme context; it does not diagnose cancer or identify the source of infection.

source.title: Sexually Transmitted Infections Treatment Guidelines, 2021 — Genital Ulcers, Anogenital Warts, and Human Papillomavirus Infections
source.jurisdiction: United States federal public-health guidance requiring UAE epidemiology, laboratory, medicine and reporting adaptation
source.population: Sexually active adolescents and adults with genital, anal or perianal ulcers, anogenital warts, HPV infection or related counselling needs, with pregnancy, immune-status, anatomy and exposure qualifiers.
source.setting: Clinical STI evaluation, diagnosis discussion, counselling and clinician-selected management.
source.exclusions: Exact for recording lesion history and examination, differential context, clinician-selected testing, entered wart or HPV findings, partner or STI context and counselling. It does not diagnose an STI, infer sexual exposure, choose treatment or define UAE reporting pathways.

exact_location.heading: Human papillomavirus infections — prevention and counselling
exact_location.locator: official HPV page prevention and counselling sections

source.evidence_paraphrase: Supports documenting an entered HPV result, the limitations of source attribution and timing, partner discussion and screening-programme context; it does not diagnose cancer or identify the source of infection.

added_items.rationale: Supports discussion without attributing source or timing.
